STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DETONATE.description: Remove and [gold]Detonate[/gold] all [gold]Spirits[/gold] on the enemy, dealing their damage.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DETONATE.title: Detonate
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RELEASE.description: You MAY spend X total [gold]Guided[/gold] and/or [gold]Divine Spirits[/gold] (that you've had before this card is played) to activate this effect. [gold]Guided Spirits[/gold] are removed first.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-RELEASE.title: Release X
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-BARRIER.description: Summon a Divine Spirit with X HP. If already summoned, raise its HP by X for this combat.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-BARRIER.title: Barrier X
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISPLACE.description: Change the enemy's [gold]Distance[/gold]. Any instance of changing [gold]Distance[/gold] is [gold]Displacement[/gold].
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-DISPLACE.title: Displace
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CLONE.description: Cards created with the [gold]Clone[/gold] keyword cannot be [gold]Cloned[/gold]. Do not confuse with copy.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-CLONE.title: Clone
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-REPLENISH.descriptio: Whenever this card is drawn, draw 1 card.
STS_KOMACHI_ONOZUKA-REPLENISH.title: Replenish
